name: Immunoprecipitation (IP)

components.name: 1. 裂解细胞 (IP Lysis Buffer + protease inhibitors)
components.note: 冰上 30 min, 间歇涡旋

components.name: 3. 定量 → 取 500 µg–1 mg 总蛋白
4. 预清除 (Protein A/G beads, 4°C, 1 h)
components.note: 去除非特异结合; 可选

components.name: 6. 加抗体 (1–5 µg) → 4°C 旋转孵育 2–4 h 或过夜
7. 加 Protein A/G beads (20–40 µL) → 4°C 旋转 1–2 h
8. 洗涤 3–5 次 (Lysis Buffer, 4°C)
components.note: 每次 1 mL, 旋转 5 min, 磁力架吸附

components.name: 9. 洗脱: 2× SDS Loading Buffer, 95°C 5 min
10. Western Blot 检测
components.note: IP 样品 + Input + IgG 对照

notes.en: Controls: (1) Normal IgG (same species) negative control; (2) Input positive control. For Co-IP: use mild lysis buffer (avoid SDS). Ab light/heavy chain interference in WB: use Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent or crosslink Ab to beads. Magnetic beads have lower background than agarose. Endogenous IP is more physiologically relevant than overexpression IP.
notes.zh: 对照：(1) Normal IgG (同种属) 阴性对照; (2) Input 阳性对照。共免疫沉淀 (Co-IP)：使用温和裂解液（避免 SDS）。抗体轻链/重链干扰 WB 检测：用 Clean-Blot IP Detection Reagent 或交联抗体到 beads。磁珠比琼脂糖珠背景更低。内源性 IP 比 overexpression IP 更有生理意义。

ref: Harlow & Lane (1988) Antibodies: A Laboratory Manual; Cell Signaling Technology IP Protocol

usage.en: Immunoprecipitate a target protein from cell lysates using antibody-bead capture.
usage.zh: 抗体-磁珠捕获法从细胞裂解液中免疫沉淀靶蛋白。
